title: Mega ASRS Warehouse Case Study | 12,000㎡ System with 50,000 Storage Locations & 1,000 Tasks/Hour
summary:
This project is a large-scale automated warehouse system designed for ultra-high-density storage and high-throughput logistics operations.

It integrates a full ASRS automation system with intelligent scheduling, multi-zone storage logic, and real-time warehouse optimization, enabling large factories and logistics hubs to handle massive SKU volumes with near-zero waiting time.
author: 13ASRS
seoTitle: Mega ASRS Warehouse Design | 12,000㎡ Automated System with 50,000 Locations & AI Logistics Optimization
seoDescription: Explore a mega-scale ASRS warehouse project featuring 12,000㎡ storage space, over 50,000 storage locations, and 1,000+ tasks per hour throughput. This system integrates AI-driven scheduling, distributed storage logic, and full warehouse automation to achieve high-efficiency logistics operations for manufacturing and e-commerce supply chains.
technology: Automated Storage and Retrieval System (ASRS) high-density storage architecture
challenge:
Large-scale manufacturing and logistics operations face several critical challenges:

Managing 45,000+ SKUs efficiently
Eliminating congestion in outbound/inbound operations
Reducing warehouse waiting time
Improving picking accuracy under high-volume conditions
Coordinating complex multi-zone storage and retrieval flows
Maintaining stable throughput at scale

Traditional warehouse systems cannot handle this level of complexity efficiently.
solutionDetail:
The solution is a fully integrated mega ASRS system combining:

High-density vertical storage system
Intelligent zoning and distributed storage logic
AI-driven scheduling engine (26 algorithms)
Real-time task balancing across multiple zones
Fully automated inbound inspection and data capture
Zero ground handling workflow design
System-level integration with WMS/WES

This architecture ensures continuous, optimized warehouse operations without bottlenecks.
layoutWorkflow:
Incoming goods are automatically scanned and recorded
AI system assigns optimal storage location
ASRS system stores goods in high-density racks
Distributed storage logic spreads SKUs across zones
Real-time system continuously optimizes picking paths
Outbound orders are processed with AI-driven task allocation
Goods are retrieved automatically and sent to dispatch zones
Optional drone or automated transport system supports final delivery layer

contentHtml:
Project Overview

This project is designed as a next-generation mega-scale automated warehouse system for high-SKU, high-throughput logistics environments.

With increasing demand for fast fulfillment and zero-delay logistics, this system enables factories and distribution centers to transition from manual or semi-automated operations into fully intelligent warehouse ecosystems.

Key Points

  • Ultra-large SKU handling capability (45,000+)
  • High-density ASRS storage architecture
  • AI-driven multi-algorithm scheduling system
  • Fully automated inbound and outbound workflow
  • Zero-wait logistics operation design
  • Scalable architecture for future expansion
  • Seamless ERP/WMS/WES integration

Implementation & Workflow

The implementation process includes:

System requirement analysis & SKU mappingWarehouse layout design (vertical + zone optimization)ASRS mechanical system installationAI scheduling system deploymentWMS/WES integration and testingFull system simulation and optimizationLive operation commissioningPerformance tuning and throughput calibration

Customer Value & Results

This system delivers strong business value:

Dramatically improves warehouse efficiencyEnables ultra-large SKU management without chaosReduces labor dependency and operational costImproves order fulfillment speed and accuracySupports scalable logistics growth for future expansionEnhances supply chain control and visibility

Conclusion

This mega ASRS warehouse system represents the next generation of intelligent logistics infrastructure, combining AI scheduling, automation hardware, and real-time data systems into one unified platform.

If you are planning a similar ASRS or large-scale automation warehouse project, we can support you with:

System designLayout planningCost estimationFull project execution
